summary: Adjusted the opening to track directly from chapter 12's sleepless manuscript work and softened the closing into an ongoing school-versus-manuscript pattern so the handoff to chapter 14's assignment fallout reads cleanly.
edits: Reframed the first line to carry over Gavin's sleepless state from chapter 12.
Changed the tower-ascent setup from an after-dinner beat to a post-manuscript departure from the dorm.
Reworked the final sentence to emphasize accumulating school consequences instead of a same-day evening cue.
